message:
fix: five bugs found during code review

1. CRITICAL: Remove noexec from /tmp tmpfs in Docker containers —
   installers that download binaries to /tmp and execute them would fail
2. CRITICAL: Install curl+ca-certificates in Docker containers before
   running installers — ubuntu:22.04 base image doesn't include curl
3. BUG: Local mode with checksum downloaded the installer script twice
   (once in Rust for verification, then again via shell script) — now
   executes the already-downloaded verified file directly
4. Container name collision in parallel mode — added milliseconds and
   random suffix to container names
5. "Checking URLs..." printed in non-human output formats

Also: fix clippy errors (absurd unsigned >= 0 comparisons, from_str
naming conflict, unnecessary borrow of clone)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
